name: Modern Ekonomi Sverige Holding AB (publ)
summary: Modern Ekonomi Sverige Holding AB (publ) operates as a consulting company that provides financial services in Sweden. The company offers basic services, such as accounting and bookkeeping, financial statements and annual reports, tax and declaration, and financial advice and analysis. It also provides e-services, which include maintaining a share register, control over expiry of contract, and the system's alarm function, online platform, digital service, scanning, and handling of expenses and remuneration. In addition, the company offers additional services, such as handling of invoice and payroll administration, discount invoices, debt collection, and staff support, as well as education for small and medium-sized businesses, and its staff. Further it provides support services for companies in various phases, such as capital needs, management, changes in ownership structure, changes in capital, etc.; and assistance for registered companies, liquidation of limited companies, and other corporate issues. The company was founded in 1969 and is based in V√É¬§ster√É¬•s, Sweden.
